query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@example.com'
SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending') AS sub
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'active' OR status = 'pending'
SELECT * FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id
SELECT * FROM products WHERE price > 100 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
DELETE FROM sessions WHERE expires_at < NOW()
